node.statement: (BP for constrained channels) Let Φ: M_{d_A} → M_{d_B} be CPTP with m_extra additional real-linear constraints on J_Φ (e.g. covariance, fixed I/O pairs, observable preservation). If Φ is an extreme point of the constrained set, then r² ≤ d_A² + m_extra. Proof: total constraint count m = d_A² + m_extra; apply Theorem 1.
